template_metadata.purpose: Gov_Reg V3 plan instance for runtime-authority verification and remediation alignment

critical_constraint.name: NO_IMPLIED_BEHAVIOR
rules: Every gate and contract must have an executable command, evidence path, and pass/fail condition
Anything not mechanically resolvable must be emitted as a blocker artifact rather than guessed
All writes are confined to the ID folder outputs and .state evidence directories

steps: Use the cited ID-folder assessment files plus the V3 template and V3 technical specification as the governing corpus
Probe external gate authorities before changing G1 or G2 conclusions
Generate the hardened artifacts named by the solution document
Capture DQ-1 through DQ-7 and DOC-SCRIPT versus P_ policy questions as blockers when unanswered
Do not modify runtime code or execute Track A remediation from this plan

step_level_contracts.description: Each phase has one explicit execution step with inputs, outputs, file scope, and failure modes

enforcement.validator_command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p = Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\gov_reg_runtime_authority_template_plan_v3.json' | ConvertFrom-Json; if($p.step_contracts.PSObject.Properties.Count -eq 6){ 'step_contracts_ok: true'; exit 0 } else { 'step_contracts_ok: false'; exit 1 }"

step_evidence_chain.description: Source corpus -> probe/search evidence -> verification -> adjudication -> blockers -> final summary
step_evidence_chain.validation_command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$root = '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs'; $files = @('SOURCE_CORPUS_MANIFEST.json','CLI_SEARCH_EVIDENCE.json','EXECUTION_VERIFICATION_REPORT.json','CANONICAL_AUTHORITY_MAP.json','FINAL_RUNTIME_AUTHORITY_SUMMARY.json'); if(@($files | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path (Join-Path $root $_)) }).Count -eq 0){ 'evidence_chain_ok: true'; exit 0 } else { 'evidence_chain_ok: false'; exit 1 }"

step_file_scoping.description: External files are read-only; repo-local writes are restricted to runtime_authority_outputs and .state

task_analysis.original_request: Adapt the assessment modifications and recommendations into the newPhasePlanProcess V3 template using the Gov_Reg ID-folder corpus and the V3 technical specification.

objective.project_name: Gov_Reg Runtime Authority Verification and Remediation Alignment
quantified_targets: Re-express all seven gaps using the hardened schema from the solution document
Resolve or explicitly block the two external gate-authority files
Emit a Track A versus Track B dependency decision artifact before any remediation execution

steps: No gap is marked closed without readable-source evidence or explicit external-authority evidence
The final summary resolves the old runtime/orchestrator contradiction by stating whether the runtime nucleus is dominant, contested, or unproven
Track A remains blocked until dependency and policy blocker artifacts say otherwise

basis_documents: 01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\This audit is useful, but it overst.txt

decision_log_entry.rationale: The work spans multiple document layers, external authorities, contested runtime roles, blocker capture, and a hardened artifact bundle.

assumptions.statement: The eight cited files are the governing corpus for this plan instance.
External gate files may be readable but remain outside repo modification scope.
Track A progress does not count as Track B closure.

in_scope: Track dependency and policy blocker capture
definition_of_done: All planned JSON outputs parse successfully
All seven gaps are represented in hardened artifacts
External authorities are read or blocked explicitly
Track A dependency and DQ blocker state are explicit

file_manifest.description: Read-only source corpus plus generated authority outputs
file_manifest.purpose: Control scope and prevent out-of-scope writes
global_files: 01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\This audit is useful, but it overst.txt

validation.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p = Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\gov_reg_runtime_authority_template_plan_v3.json' | ConvertFrom-Json; if($p.file_manifest.by_phase.PSObject.Properties.Count -eq 6){ 'file_manifest_valid: true'; exit 0 } else { 'file_manifest_valid: false'; exit 1 }"
checks: All generated artifacts have a producing phase

phase_overview.name: Source Freeze
phase_overview.purpose: Capture the governing corpus and output roots

phase_overview.name: External Probe and Search Evidence
phase_overview.purpose: Probe external gate files and restate search evidence

phase_overview.name: Authority Adjudication
phase_overview.purpose: Assign canonical, contested, or missing authority states

phase_overview.name: Blockers and Dependencies
phase_overview.purpose: Capture duplicates, missing behaviors, track dependencies, and policy blockers

phase_overview.name: Finalization
phase_overview.purpose: Validate the bundle and emit the final summary

dag_validation.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p = Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\gov_reg_runtime_authority_template_plan_v3.json' | ConvertFrom-Json; if($p.phase_plan.phase_overview.Count -eq 6){ 'dag_ready: true'; exit 0 } else { 'dag_ready: false'; exit 1 }"

trigger: Unreadable external authority that affects canonicality
Unanswered policy blocker that would change Track A execution

rules: This plan is read-mostly and writes only to the ID outputs and .state directories
Runtime code and external files remain read-only

priority_rules: External authority probe precedes any change to G1 or G2 conclusions
Track dependency artifact precedes any Track A authorization

enforcement.rule: Every planned output must exist and parse before the next phase starts

PH-00.purpose: Freeze the governing corpus into SOURCE_CORPUS_MANIFEST.json

failure_modes.meaning: A governing source file is missing
failure_modes.remediation: Stop and restore the missing source

PH-01.purpose: Probe external authorities and restate search evidence
invariants: No gap status is finalized here

failure_modes.meaning: An external authority cannot be read
failure_modes.remediation: Emit blocker status and keep affected gap open or contested

invariants: Use the hardened schema, not the older gap-report schema
postconditions: Verification artifacts parse and contain execution_verification

failure_modes.meaning: Generated verification does not use the hardened fields

PH-03.purpose: Adjudicate canonicality, conflicts, and runtime nucleus status
invariants: Contested roles remain contested until the evidence resolves them
postconditions: Authority map, nucleus map, and conflict matrix parse

failure_modes.meaning: A role still has unseparated competing candidates
failure_modes.remediation: Leave it contested and record the blocker

PH-04.purpose: Capture duplicates, missing behaviors, track dependencies, and policy blockers
invariants: Do not guess owner policy answers
Track A stays blocked if dependency or DQ state is unresolved

failure_modes.meaning: An unresolved policy question was treated as decided
failure_modes.remediation: Rewrite the blocker artifact and preserve blocked status

PH-05.purpose: Validate the bundle and emit the final summary
invariants: No new evidence is introduced in the final summary

failure_modes.remediation: Stop and regenerate the missing artifact

failure_modes.meaning: A required source file is missing
failure_modes.remediation: Restore the source corpus before continuing

invariants: No closure status is assigned here
postconditions: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\EXTERNAL_AUTHORITY_PROBE.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\CLI_SEARCH_EVIDENCE.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null"

failure_modes.meaning: One or both external files cannot be read

invariants: Use execution_verification plus split confidence fields
postconditions: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\EXECUTION_VERIFICATION_REPORT.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\IMPORT_VERIFICATION_REPORT.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null"

failure_modes.meaning: The hardened schema is not present in the verification outputs

STEP-001.purpose: Create authority, nucleus, and conflict artifacts
invariants: Contested roles remain contested until the evidence resolves them
postconditions: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\CANONICAL_AUTHORITY_MAP.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\RUNTIME_NUCLEUS_MAP.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\CONFLICT_MATRIX.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null"

failure_modes.meaning: A canonical role is still unresolved
failure_modes.remediation: Leave it contested and carry it into blockers

invariants: Track A remains blocked if dependency or DQ state is unresolved
postconditions: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\DUPLICATE_ROLE_ANALYSIS.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\MISSING_AUTHORITY_REPORT.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\TRACK_DEPENDENCY_DECISION.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\DQ_POLICY_BLOCKERS.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\BLOCKER_REMEDIATION_REPORT.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null"

failure_modes.meaning: A required DQ or contract blocker was omitted
failure_modes.remediation: Regenerate the blocker bundle before finalization

invariants: The final summary introduces no new evidence

failure_modes.meaning: The final summary does not trace to earlier artifacts
failure_modes.remediation: Regenerate it from the prior outputs only

validation_gates.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\EXTERNAL_AUTHORITY_PROBE.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\CLI_SEARCH_EVIDENCE.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; 'phase_01_ok: true'"

validation_gates.purpose: Verification artifacts use the hardened schema
validation_gates.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\EXECUTION_VERIFICATION_REPORT.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\IMPORT_VERIFICATION_REPORT.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; 'phase_02_ok: true'"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\CANONICAL_AUTHORITY_MAP.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\RUNTIME_NUCLEUS_MAP.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\CONFLICT_MATRIX.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; 'phase_03_ok: true'"

validation_gates.purpose: Blocker bundle parses and captures policy blockers
validation_gates.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\DUPLICATE_ROLE_ANALYSIS.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\MISSING_AUTHORITY_REPORT.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\TRACK_DEPENDENCY_DECISION.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\DQ_POLICY_BLOCKERS.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID\runtime_authority_outputs\BLOCKER_REMEDIATION_REPORT.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; 'phase_04_ok: true'"

validation_gates.purpose: Final summary parses and references key runtime-authority booleans

permissions.validation_command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if(Test-Path '01260207201000001250_REGISTRY\ID'){ 'permissions_ok: true'; exit 0 } else { 'permissions_ok: false'; exit 1 }"

ci_parity.notes: All gates are non-interactive PowerShell or Python commands

what_was_delivered.title: Gov_Reg Runtime Authority V3 Plan Instance

factors: Policy blockers captured instead of guessed

next_steps: Execute PH-00 to freeze the source corpus
Probe external gate files in PH-01 before revisiting G1 or G2
Generate hardened verification and authority artifacts in PH-02 and PH-03
Do not authorize Track A while PH-04 still reports unresolved blockers
known_limitations: This plan does not execute Track A remediation
External files may remain unreadable and therefore keep some runtime roles blocked
Owner answers for DQ-1 through DQ-7 are captured, not auto-resolved

when_receiving_project_request: Treat Track A and Track B as separate until TRACK_DEPENDENCY_DECISION.json says otherwise
Do not treat documentation references as proof of implementation
Probe external gate files before revising G1 or G2 outcomes
Emit blocker artifacts instead of inferring missing owner decisions
do_not: Do not modify runtime code or external governance files
Do not mark a gap closed when evidence is only referenced_not_readable or blocked
Do not imply that DOC-SCRIPT minting is still valid without policy support
remember: Every role outcome must be evidence-backed
All writes stay under runtime_authority_outputs and .state
